svg.title: EML tile internal architecture
svg.desc: Internal signal flow of one EML tile: x feeds through scale-by-1/ln2 then mitchell_exp2; y feeds through mitchell_log2 then scale-by-ln2; results subtract to give output.
svg.text: No multiplier · No CORDIC · ~50–80 GE at 130nm
max approximation error ≈ 0.086 per log/exp stage · observed error < 0.17 over test suite
